statement: In every magma, Equation 1798 (`x = (y * z) * ((z * z) * y)`) implies Equation 249 (`x = (y * (z * z)) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0863
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op z z) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z z)) w)
